# Agents & Skills

This file declares all available skills for the Campus Errand System project. Skills enable specialized workflows for different domains.

## Available Skills

### Engineering & Development

- **[ai-agent-engineer](./skills/ai-agent-engineer/SKILL.md)** - Design AI agents and automation workflows using LLMs
- **[backend-engineer](./skills/backend-engineer/SKILL.md)** - Design and implement backend APIs and services
- **[frontend-engineer](./skills/frontend-engineer/SKILL.md)** - Build modern frontend applications using best UI engineering practices
- **[coding-expert](./skills/coding-expert/SKILL.md)** - Generate production-quality code following modern best practices
- **[code-reviewer](./skills/code-reviewer/SKILL.md)** - Perform professional code reviews and suggest improvements
- **[debug-specialist](./skills/debug-specialist/SKILL.md)** - Diagnose and fix software errors using logs and stack traces
- **[test-engineer](./skills/test-engineer/SKILL.md)** - Create automated unit and integration tests
- **[refactor-optimizer](./skills/refactor-optimizer/SKILL.md)** - Improve code readability, structure, and performance
- **[performance-optimizer](./skills/performance-optimizer/SKILL.md)** - Improve application performance and scalability

### Architecture & System Design

- **[software-architecture](./skills/software-architecture/SKILL.md)** - Design scalable software architectures including modules, APIs, and data models
- **[api-designer](./skills/api-designer/SKILL.md)** - Design REST or GraphQL APIs with clean structure
- **[database-designer](./skills/database-designer/SKILL.md)** - Design relational or NoSQL database schemas
- **[data-engineer](./skills/data-engineer/SKILL.md)** - Design data pipelines and data processing systems

### DevOps & Infrastructure

- **[devops-engineer](./skills/devops-engineer/SKILL.md)** - Design CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows
- **[docker-specialist](./skills/docker-specialist/SKILL.md)** - Create Dockerfiles and container configurations

### Quality & Security

- **[security-reviewer](./skills/security-reviewer/SKILL.md)** - Review code for security vulnerabilities

### Design & Product

- **[product-design](./skills/product-design/SKILL.md)** - Design complete digital product structures including features, user flows, and pages
- **[ui-ux-design](./skills/ui-ux-design/SKILL.md)** - Design modern, high-quality UI/UX layouts for web and mobile applications

### Project Management & Documentation

- **[project-planner](./skills/project-planner/SKILL.md)** - Plan software projects including milestones and development roadmap
- **[technical-writer](./skills/technical-writer/SKILL.md)** - Generate developer documentation including READMEs and API docs

---

## Usage

To use a skill in GitHub Copilot Chat:

1. Type `/` to open the slash commands menu
2. Select the skill you want to use
3. Provide the required task description

Example:

```
/backend-engineer Design a REST API for user management with authentication
```
